name: single_key_default_sighash
provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x20 plus an independent Python P2MR serializer; the vector signs the manually computed P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.
dataSigProvenance: Generated with qbit-libbitcoinpqc Rust API from 128 bytes of 0x20 entropy. dataSigHash is computed independently as sha256(sha256("QbitDataSigPQC") || sha256("QbitDataSigPQC") || messageHash), then signed with libbitcoinpqc. dataSigScriptPubKey commits to sha256(sha256("P2MRLeaf") || sha256("P2MRLeaf") || c0 || 22 || dataSigLeafScript) with control block c1; no qbit signing, script, or P2MR helper was used to produce these data-signature fixture fields.

dataSigAdd.provenance: Generated with qbit-libbitcoinpqc Rust API from 128-byte deterministic entropy fills 0x20, 0x21, and 0x22. dataSigHash is computed independently as sha256(sha256("QbitDataSigPQC") || sha256("QbitDataSigPQC") || messageHash). P2MR scriptPubKeys commit to independently serialized ADDPQC leaf scripts with sha256(sha256("P2MRLeaf") || sha256("P2MRLeaf") || c0 || CompactSize(script_len) || leafScript) and control block c1; no qbit signing, script, or P2MR helper was used to produce these ADDPQC fixture fields.
